debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
h : U ∼ V
⊢ Set U ∼ Set V

failed_attempts:
Equinumerous.of_inverse
    (fun A => image (Equiv.toFun h) A)
    (fun B => image (Equiv.invFun h) B)
    (fun B => by
      ext x
      simp [Equiv.toFun_as_coe, Equiv.invFun_as_coe, h.left_inv, h.right_inv])
    (fun A => by
      ext x
      simp [Equiv.toFun_as_coe, Equiv.invFun_as_coe, h.left_inv, h.right_inv])

let ⟨f, g, hf, hg⟩ := h
  have h1 : (image g) ∘ (image f) = id := image_comp_id hg
  have h2 : (image f) ∘ (image g) = id := image_comp_id hf
  ⟨image f, image g, h2, h1⟩

let ⟨f, g, hf, hg⟩ := h
  have h1 : (image g) ∘ (image f) = id := image_comp_id hg
  have h2 : (image f) ∘ (image g) = id := image_comp_id hf
  ⟨image f, image g, h2, h1⟩

Equinumerous.of_inverse
    (fun A => image (Equiv.toFun h) A)
    (fun B => image (Equiv.invFun h) B)
    (fun B => by
      ext x
      simp [Equiv.toFun_as_coe, Equiv.invFun_as_coe, h.left_inv, h.right_inv])
    (fun A => by
      ext x
      simp [Equiv.toFun_as_coe, Equiv.invFun_as_coe, h.left_inv, h.right_inv])

let ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
  let g := fun s : Set U => image f s
  let h_inv := fun t : Set V => image (Equiv.symm f) t
  ⟨Equiv.mk g h_inv (fun t => by ext x; simp [Equiv.symm_apply_apply, hf]) (fun s => by ext x; simp [hf, Equiv.apply_symm_apply])⟩

  have h2 : (image f) ∘ (image g) = id := image_comp_id hf
  ⟨image f, image g, h2, h1⟩

let ⟨f, g, hf, hg⟩ := h
  have H1 : (image g) ∘ (image f) = id := image_comp_id hg
  have H2 : (image f) ∘ (image g) = id := image_comp_id hf
  ⟨image f, image g, H2, H1⟩

let ⟨f, g, hf, hg⟩ := h
  have h1 : (image g) ∘ (image f) = id := image_comp_id hg
  have h2 : (image f) ∘ (image g) = id := image_comp_id hf
  ⟨image f, image g, h2, h1⟩

by
  obtain ⟨f, g, hf, hg⟩ := equinum_iff_inverse_pair.mp h
  refine' ⟨fun A => image f A, fun B => image g B, _, _⟩
  · ext B
    simp [hf]
  · ext A
    simp [hg]
Equinumerous.set_congr h

let ⟨f, hf⟩ := h in
  let g := fun s => image f s in
  let g_inv := fun t => image (invFun f hf.1) t in
  ⟨g, by
    apply Equiv.of_inverse
    · intro s
      ext x
      simp [image, invFun_eq_of_injective hf.1]
    · intro t
      ext x
      simp [image, invFun_eq_of_injective hf.1]⟩
